insights.title: Forecast ↓ — Expect App Total Revenue to soften next period — App Total New Subs -21.2%, led by YCP.
insights.body: App Total New Subs -21.2% runs well below its upstream (App Total New User -10.8%, App Total Install -3.7%; Δ -14.0pp). With the 7-day trial lag, expect App Total Revenue to soften next period. The drag is concentrated in YCP (-30.3%); YMK is -13.7%.

insights.title: Lead–lag check — App Total Revenue is tracking its subs signal as expected.
insights.body: App Total Revenue 07-19 vs 07-12 = -4.3% tracks its 7-day driver App Total New Subs 07-12 vs 07-05 = -0.2% — revenue is following the subs signal as expected.

insights.title: Funnel conversion — Conversion to New Subs splits by app — YMK softening (-13.7% vs upstream -6.8%).
insights.body: Upstream→New Subs conversion splits by app: YMK -13.7% vs upstream -6.8% (conversion softening); YCP -30.3% vs upstream -9.7% (conversion softening). (Revenue is downstream and lags ~7d — see the lead–lag check.)

insights.title: App split — App Total New User -10.8% concentrated in YCP — not platform-wide.
insights.body: App Total New User -10.8% is uneven by app (All App -10.8%, YMK -11.4%, YCP -12.7%, YCV -6.3%) — driven mainly by YCP, not a platform-wide shift.

insights.title: Country outlier — US is the outlier on App Total Install (-11.9% vs -3.7%).
insights.body: App Total Install · All App: US -11.9% vs all-country -3.7% (Δ -8.2pp; ≈38% of revenue).

insights.title: Data gap — 11 slice(s) missing data — excluded from analysis.
insights.body: 11 slice(s) n/a (missing data): YAT·CA·App Total New Subs, YAT·DE·App Total New Subs, YAT·DE·App Total Revenue, YAT·ES·App Total Revenue ….
